blocks.text: smiled at the water. She didn't make it a bigger moment than it was.
understood. She looked at the water too.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Hey — you two just get in?

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: About an hour ago. I'm Mara. This is Julian.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: Marcus. Come meet everyone — they're right behind me.

blocks.speaker: Dean Ashby
blocks.content: Dean. Good to meet you both.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Long but worth it. This place is beautiful.

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: Cade. You two neighbors for the whole weekend?

blocks.speaker: Cade Mercer
blocks.content: Perfect. We'll put you to work.

blocks.speaker: Nadia Reyes
blocks.content: Nadia. The beach is best in the morning before the wind picks up. If you haven't been to this part of the coast before.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: First time. Thank you — I'll be up early.
She offered useful information to a stranger within thirty seconds of meeting her. Filed.

blocks.speaker: Marcus Calloway
blocks.content: We're doing a bonfire tonight if you two want to come by. Nothing fancy. Just a fire, good people.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: That sounds really nice. What time?

blocks.speaker: Sophie Laurent
blocks.content: Please come. We have way too much food.

blocks.prompt: Six people. What does Julian hold onto?

options.label: Marcus — genuinely warm. Not performing it.
Nadia — first words out were useful information. Deliberate.
The way the group moved around Marcus without realizing it.
